name: open-chat-cut
description: Operate the local OpenChatCut editor through a loopback-only Codex MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Edit local video projects with Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a locally running OpenChatCut daemon to inspect projects, plan and apply revision-safe edits, transcribe speech, create captions and motion graphics, generate media, clean audio, preview changes, and export pinned revisions.
defaultPrompt: Remove filler words and long pauses, then add readable captions
Turn this long recording into a polished short with B-roll
Validate the current revision and export a delivery-ready MP4
